narrative:
Cols 63-G (precinct in Franklin County) has 797 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
